Guys, welcome back. We are now going to dive into Theme Plate 12, which is the curious case and an option to add your mid-card bonus, like we spoke about earlier. This is your chance to really back up your product's biggest claim with a compelling and curiosity-arousing case study, and then to introduce that mid-card as a bonus that further supports and syncs up with the outcomes produced by that case study. So here is how it breaks down. You're going to start off by reaffirming that big sales argument around your launch. You'll acknowledge that they haven't fully bought in yet. This is what really grounds it in something that they could feel and see and see themselves doing. Then the call to action will introduce that case study without revealing too much detail. You really want to bring more curiosity around it and invite them to click through to see more what that's about. Build desire around those outcomes. If the case study is a student or a user of your product that experienced some awesome results, build desire around those outcomes and with another call to action.
